chat.title: AI Consulting
chat.subtitle: AI Globalization & ESG Expert
chat.placeholder: Ask your question, e.g., How do I enter the Southeast Asian market with my AI product?
chat.loginRequired: Please log in to use the AI consulting feature
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm HQ (HaiWen), your professional consultant for AI globalization and ESG innovation.
chat.welcomeDesc:
I can help you:
• Develop go-global strategies and market entry paths
• Analyze target market regulations, compliance, and risks
• Design ESG sustainability plans
• Understand international competitive landscape and opportunities
chat.suggestion1: How can I enter the European market with my AI product?
chat.suggestion2: What are ESG requirements in Southeast Asian AI markets?
chat.suggestion3: How to handle overseas data privacy regulations (GDPR, etc.)?
chat.suggestion4: What are common failure reasons for Chinese AI companies going global?
chat.error: Failed to get response. Please check your connection and retry.
chat.noKey: AI service not configured. Please contact the administrator.
